# Summoning Rituals

The following spells summon one or more creatures as their main effect. The path, school, and
gem requirements for each spell are listed, along with the summoned creature's full stat block
in the **Special** column. All of these spells are rituals; spells that summon creatures
*during battle* are not rituals and are listed under [Battlefield Spells](12-battlefield-spells.qmd).

Sections titled "National Rituals" list spells that can only be cast by the indicated nation.
Spells available to more than one nation are repeated under each nation.

## Abbreviations

| Key | Meaning |
|-----|---------|
| School | School of magic (Alt = Alteration, Conj = Conjuration, Const = Construction, Ench = Enchantment, Thaum = Thaumaturgy, Blood = Blood Magic) |
| Cost | Gems required for casting; the gem type matches the primary path |
| Rng | Range in provinces (no range = takes effect where it is cast) |
| Dmg | Damage |
| HP / Str / Att / Def / Mor / MR / Pre / Enc | Hit Points / Strength / Attack / Defence / Morale / Magic Resistance / Precision / Encumbrance |
| Mv / MM / TM | Movement / Map Move / Task Master |
| Amph / PAmph / Aqua | Amphibian / Poor Amphibian / Aquatic |
| NNEat | Need Not Eat |
| Und / Mind | Undead / Mindless |
| Spi / Illu / Eth | Spirit Form / Illusion / Ethereal |
| SpSi / TrSi / DV | Spirit Sight / True Sight / Darkvision |
| Magic / Inanim | Magic Being / Inanimate Being |
| AP / AN | Armor-Piercing / Armor-Negating |
| FS / MS / SS / WS | Forest / Mountain / Swamp / Waste Survival |
